title:
Crease Mechanics on Instagram: "Bandwidth = mental energy.

When you give it to fear, your vision narrows and your game tightens.
When you give it to the present, execution sharpens.

Control your attention. Control your game.

#CreaseMechanics #GoalieCoach #HockeyGoalie #MentalGame #SportsPerformance"
